summary: Cart Flow Frontend Testing - Full E2E test of shop page, add-to-cart, cart sidebar, and checkout process. All core cart features are working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

test_results.shop_page_loads: PASS - 24 product cards displayed with pillar filters
test_results.add_to_cart_button: PASS - Add to Cart button visible and clickable
test_results.cart_sidebar_opens: PASS - Cart sidebar/sheet opens showing 'Your Requests'
test_results.cart_shows_item_info: PASS - Product name, image, price, quantity displayed correctly
test_results.quantity_increase: PASS - '+' button increases quantity and updates total
test_results.remove_item_button: PASS - X button visible for removing items
test_results.checkout_navigation_authenticated: PASS - Checkout button navigates to /checkout when logged in
test_results.checkout_navigation_unauthenticated: EXPECTED - Redirects to /login when not logged in (protected route)
test_results.checkout_step1_review: PASS - Review Your Order shows cart items, Pet Details (optional), Frequently Bought Together
test_results.checkout_step2_delivery: PASS - Delivery form with Full Name, Email, Phone, WhatsApp, Address, City, Pincode, State, Landmark
test_results.order_summary: PASS - Shows Subtotal, Shipping, Taxes (CGST/SGST), Total with correct calculations
test_results.free_shipping_indicator: PASS - Progress bar shows amount needed for free shipping

action_items: Optional: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent in CartSidebar for better accessibility
Optional: Add data-testid attributes to checkout form fields for automated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cart flow is fully functional. Checkout page has a 3-step wizard: Step 1 (Review Order), Step 2 (Delivery Information), Step 3 (Payment - requires Razorpay integration). User must be authenticated to access checkout. Cart state persists in localStorage. Form fields in checkout step 2 include: Full Name, Email, Phone, WhatsApp, Address, City, Pincode, State, Landmark. Delivery/Pickup toggle available. Free shipping threshold is ₹3000.
features_tested: Shop page loads with products visible - PASS
Clicking on a product opens product detail page - PASS
Add to Cart button is visible and clickable - PASS
After adding to cart, cart sidebar shows item count - PASS
Clicking cart icon opens CartSidebar - PASS
CartSidebar shows added items with correct info (name, price, quantity) - PASS
Quantity +/- buttons work in cart - PASS
Remove item button is visible (X icon) - PASS
Proceed to Checkout button navigates to /checkout - PASS (when authenticated)
Checkout page loads with cart items summary - PASS
Form fields are functional (name, email, phone, address) - PASS
Order total calculates correctly with taxes - PASS
